StreamsStatus.description:
The stream status:
[active] The Stream is healthy and processing blocks
[paused] The Stream is paused and is not processing blocks
[error] The Stream has encountered an error and is not processing blocks

AbiItem.description: The abi to parse the log object of the contract

webhookUrl.description: Webhook URL where moralis will send the POST request.

tag.description: A user-provided tag that will be send along the webhook, the user can use this tag to identify the specific stream if multiple streams are present

topic0.description: An Array of topic0's in string-signature format ex: ['FunctionName(address,uint256)']

allAddresses.description: Include events for all addresses (only applied when abi and topic0 is provided)

includeNativeTxs.description: Include or not native transactions defaults to false

includeContractLogs.description: Include or not logs of contract interactions defaults to false

includeInternalTxs.description: Include or not include internal transactions defaults to false

includeAllTxLogs.description: Include all logs if atleast one value in tx or log matches stream config

getNativeBalances.description: Include native balances for each address in the webhook

chainIds.description: The ids of the chains for this stream in hex Ex: ["0x1","0x38"]

filterPossibleSpamAddresses.description: Indicator if it is a demo stream

info.title: Streams Api
info.description: API that provides access to Moralis Streams

get.description: Get all the evm streams for the current project based on the project api-key .

parameters.description: The id of the stream to get
parameters.name: id

parameters.description: The id of the stream to update
parameters.name: id

parameters.description: The id of the stream to delete
parameters.name: id

parameters.description: The id of the stream to duplicate
parameters.name: id

post.description: Updates the status of specific evm stream.

parameters.description: The id of the stream to update
parameters.name: id

get.description: Get all addresses associated with a specific stream.

parameters.description: the id of the stream to get the addresses from
parameters.name: id

post.description: Adds an address to a Stream.

parameters.description: The id of the stream to add the address to
parameters.name: id

parameters.description: The id of the stream to replace the address from
parameters.name: id

delete.description: Deletes an address from a Stream.

parameters.description: The id of the stream to delete the address from
parameters.name: id

post.description: Get webhook data returned on the block number with provided stream config.
post.summary: Get webhook data returned on the block number with provided stream config
Send webhook based on a specific block number using stream config and addresses.

get.description: Get the global stats for the account.
Get the stats for the streamId specified

parameters.description: The id of the stream to get the stats
parameters.name: streamId
